metadata.description: WAUTH doorkeeper plugins — risk-tiered, human-approved access to GitHub, Stripe, and Salesforce for AI agents. Thin clients over the doorkeeper MCP; the agent never holds a platform credential.

plugins.name: wauth-github
plugins.description: GitHub coding-agent actions via the WAUTH GitHub doorkeeper (protected-branch merges → passkey; force-push / CI-bypass / branch-protection / secrets → passkey + iProov liveness).

plugins.name: wauth-stripe
plugins.description: Stripe actions via the WAUTH Stripe doorkeeper (passkey + iProov liveness for high-risk).

plugins.name: wauth-salesforce
plugins.description: Salesforce actions via the WAUTH Salesforce doorkeeper (production writes + protected objects escalate to passkey + liveness).

plugins.name: wauth-entra
plugins.description: Microsoft Entra identity actions via the WAUTH Entra doorkeeper (directory reads free; MFA reset / privileged role grant → passkey + iProov liveness).

plugins.name: wauth-saas-jit
plugins.description: Just-in-time, time-limited SaaS access via the WAUTH SaaS JIT control plane (AFPS) — production grant → passkey; privileged/admin or contained-token mode → passkey + iProov liveness; auto-revoked + reconciled, agent never holds the credential.
